---
title: ""
engine: knitr
format:
  html:
    body-classes: front-page
---

# {-}

<div style="text-align: center; margin-top: 1.5em;">
  <img src="assets/images/cover/thinking-with-ai-cover.png" width="75%" />
</div>

<div style="text-align: center; font-style: normal; margin-top: 1em;">
  Human-AI-Guide · Updated `r format(Sys.Date(), "%b %Y")`
</div>
